title: White Shredded Tissue Paper 100g - Soft Gift Box & Hamper Filling for Birthdays, Weddings, Easter, Christmas, Anniversaries and Luxury Presentations
features: 【100g Soft White Shredded Paper】Contains 100 grams of premium white shredded tissue paper with a soft, smooth texture that provides gentle protection for delicate gifts while creating an elegant presentation.

【Versatile Filler for All Celebrations】The perfect neutral choice for numerous occasions including wedding favours, Christmas gifts, birthday presents, christenings, baby showers, and formal events. Its universal colour scheme fits any theme.

【Ideal Hamper & Gift Box Filling】Specifically designed as hamper stuffing and gift box filler. Creates a beautiful base that conceals hamper bottoms while adding volume and a luxurious unboxing experience to your presentations.
【Easy-to-Use】This shredded white tissue paper separates easily and doesn't clump together, making gift preparation quick and efficient. Simply fluff and place for instant elegant results.
【Multi-Purpose Decorative Material】Beyond gift-giving, perfect for craft projects, party decorations, event table scatters, and as a decorative accent in retail displays or photo shoots.
description: Product Description Create Moments That Are Remembered Enocent – Where the Art of Giving Begins We believe every gift tells a story. Let our shredded white paper set the scene for yours. Discover the effortless elegance that turns your thoughtful gifts into unforgettable presentations. Product Details & Product Specifications Type White Shredded Paper Colour White Size 100g Texture Soft, fluffy strands Ideal for Gift Boxes | Hampers | Gift Bags | Easter Baskets | Luxury Gift Baskets | Wedding Favours | Christmas Gifts | Birthday Presents | Anniversary Presents | Baby Shower | Special Occasions | Product Packaging | Small Business Crafted for a Luxurious Feel & Flawless Presentation We’ve selected a premium tissue paper that delivers a soft, fluffy texture, setting it apart from ordinary shredded fillers. This soft shredded paper acts as a protective cloud for delicate items, from fine jewellery to cherished keepsakes, ensuring they arrive in perfect condition while adding a tangible sense of luxury. Create Stunning Gift Presentations with Ease Elevate your gift-giving instantly. Simply place this soft shredded paper into your gift box or hamper before adding the present. It acts as the perfect hamper straw filling, adding volume, colour, and a professional finish that impresses every time. Endless Creative Possibilities Gift wrapping and box filling (e.g., shredded paper for gift boxes) Hamper and basket stuffing (e.g., hamper stuffing filler, shredded paper for hampers) Themed parties and events (e.g., wedding confetti, birthday gifts, Christmas decorations) Craft projects and DIY decorations Baby shower favours or Easter egg hunts Present Gifts Beautifully with Enocent Shredded Tissue Paper
